landing.text: Back to Meaning Maximization is a holistic method that helps your body find its way Back to Meaning Maximization. Through gentle oscillations, a reset is created on all joint levels – from the toes to the tip of the nose. An unconscious learning process is initiated, and changes can take place.
landing.text2: Many people report deep relaxation, improved joint mobility and enhanced quality of life after a session. Noticeable changes are possible in 1–3 sessions.

methode.untertitel: How Back to Meaning Maximization Works
methode.text1: Back to Meaning Maximization is a profound and holistic wellness method. It works with gentle oscillations that reach the entire musculoskeletal system – every joint, every connection, from the toes to the tip of the nose. The body is brought into relaxation and an unconscious learning process is initiated.
methode.text2: The focus is not on eliminating individual symptoms, but on strengthening the body's natural self-regulation. Usually we take care too late, when the body is already overloaded and expresses this through pain. Back to Meaning Maximization nurtures the joints – before it is too late. And when complaints already exist, the method can support lasting relief.
methode.prinzip1_text: Through targeted, gentle impulses, the entire body is set into a natural oscillation. The joints are mobilised and tension can release.
methode.prinzip2_text: Back to Meaning Maximization does not only work locally at one point, but on all joint levels simultaneously. The body is addressed as an interconnected system.
methode.prinzip3_text: The oscillations initiate a process that continues to work even after the session. The body learns to regulate itself and integrate new movement patterns.

ablauf.schritt1_text: Each session begins with a short conversation. Where do you have complaints? What are your expectations? This allows us to tailor the session individually to your needs.
ablauf.schritt2_text: You lie clothed on a comfortable treatment table. Through gentle oscillations, your body is brought into relaxation. The method works on all joint levels – a profound reset for the entire musculoskeletal system.
ablauf.schritt3_text: Many people already feel a clear change during the session: deeper relaxation, more mobility, a feeling of lightness. Lasting improvements are possible in 1–3 sessions.
ablauf.schritt4_text: The effect often continues to unfold in the days after the session. The learning process that was initiated continues to work unconsciously – your body integrates the new impulses into everyday life.

fuer_wen.text: Back to Meaning Maximization can be particularly beneficial for a wide range of musculoskeletal complaints and stress-related conditions. The method is suitable for people of all ages.
fuer_wen.indikation4: Everyday stress, chronic tension and exhaustion
fuer_wen.indikation7: Prevention – before the body signals through pain
fuer_wen.vorbeugung_text: Usually we take care too late, when the body is already overloaded and expresses this through pain. Back to Meaning Maximization nurtures the joints – regular sessions can help prevent complaints and enhance overall well-being.
fuer_wen.nicht_fuer_text: This wellness method does not replace medical or psychotherapeutic treatment. For acute health complaints, please consult a doctor or naturopath. If you are in a difficult financial situation, please do not hesitate to talk to us about it.

preise.mitglieder_hinweis: BtMM members exchange sessions via BtMM Coins – no cash flow needed.
preise.buchung_hinweis: Book online or via the contact form
preise.finanzen_hinweis: If you are in a difficult financial situation, please do not hesitate to talk to us about it.

termine.text: Book your appointment directly online or contact us with any questions. We take time for individual consultation.

ueber.name: Samjo
ueber.text1: Johannes-Samuel Gartzke – known as Samjo – grew up on the happyfarm in the Black Forest, a farm in Oberkirch that has combined self-sufficiency, craftsmanship, body work and community living since 2003. From a training in systemic body work, Back to Meaning Maximization was born: a holistic method that perceives the human being as a whole.
ueber.text2: The body is a system – everything is connected, everything influences everything else. This principle shapes every session. Back to Meaning Maximization is more than a technique: it is the conviction that the body knows what it needs – and that gentle, targeted impulses help it find its way Back to Meaning Maximization.
ueber.qualifikation2: Raised with a holistic lifestyle on the happyfarm (since 2003)
ueber.qualifikation3: Founder of the Back to Meaning Maximization Universe – Freiburg
